tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies API key and connectivity to ElevenLabs.

tools.name: text-to-speech
tools.description: Generate speech from text using ElevenLabs. Returns the audio file path. Use the default voice (do not specify voiceId) unless the user explicitly requests a different voice.

text.description: The text to convert to speech

voiceId.description: Voice ID to use. Use list_voices to see available voices. Default: Marianne Muller (Spanish)

modelId.description: Model to use: eleven_monolingual_v1, eleven_multilingual_v1, eleven_multilingual_v2, eleven_turbo_v2, eleven_turbo_v2_5, eleven_flash_v2_5 (default)

stability.description: Voice stability (0.0 to 1.0, default: 0.5). Higher = more stable/consistent

similarityBoost.description: Similarity boost (0.0 to 1.0, default: 0.75). Higher = closer to original voice

style.description: Style exaggeration (0.0 to 1.0, default: 0). Higher = more expressive

speakerBoost.description: Enable speaker boost for better quality (default: true)

outputPath.description: Custom output path for the audio file (optional). Defaults to /workspace/tts-{timestamp}.mp3

tools.name: list-voices
tools.description: List available voices from ElevenLabs account. Supports filtering by name, category, and limiting results.

search.description: Search term to filter voices by name (case-insensitive, optional)

limit.description: Maximum number of voices to return (optional, default: all)

category.description: Filter by voice category: premade, cloned, generated, professional (optional)

tools.name: get-voice
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific voice including settings and samples.

voiceId.description: The ID of the voice to get information about

tools.name: generate-conversation
tools.description: Generate a multi-speaker conversation from a YAML script. Reads a YAML file with speaker voices and dialogue, generates audio for each line, and combines them into a single audio file. Requires ffmpeg installed.

scriptPath.description: Path to the YAML script file (absolute or relative to current directory)

tools.name: get-subscription
tools.description: Get information about the current ElevenLabs subscription including character usage and limits.
